output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?rider ?nickname WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P179 wd:Q204109 ; wdt:P3510 wd:Q35027 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2003"))
  ?event wdt:P1191 ?result .
  ?result wdt:P1315 "1" .
  ?result wdt:P186 ?rider .
  ?rider wdt:P3042 ?nickname .
  FILTER(LANG(?nickname) = "en")
}
LIMIT 1
